untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of a specific technical pattern (BARR - Broadening Ascending Rectangle) with trend line identification and piercing logic. This requires pattern recognition and geometric analysis (trend line slope, support/resistance levels, breakout confirmation) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators and simple comparison operators. The entry condition 'wait for BARR to pierce the trend line' and 'move higher after trend line pierce' requires multi-bar pattern detection and trend line construction, which is not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted minimal approximation using price crossing logic, but this does not capture the essence of the BARR pattern recognition required by the original signal. The signal is inherently untranslatable without pattern detection capabilities. Stop-loss percentage derived from example (17.88 vs 18.25 = 1.03%).
